name: Recomposition · Phase 1 · Week 3 (Volume)
author: Coach (Claude)
notes: Lower Hinge progressed from confirmed May 11 data (Leg Curl +5 lbs, Hip Thrust +5 lbs, BSS adds first load, RDL adds 4th set). Upper Push / Upper Pull / Lower Squat held flat — no CSV export from May 12–17. WEEK 4 (May 25) = DELOAD — export workout_data.csv this Sunday so Coach can set deload weights.

1.name: Upper Push
1.note: Elliptical 20 min warmup + 20 min cooldown. Face pulls first — slow, elbows high. Weights held flat from Week 2 targets; no data to progress from.

exercises.note: Rear delt pre-activation — slow tempo, elbows high

2.name: Lower Hinge (posterior chain)
2.note: Elliptical 20 min warmup + 20 min cooldown. Slow eccentric on RDL and leg curl. BSS now has load — hold a 25 lb plate at chest or single 25 lb dumbbell.

exercises.note: Add the 4th set. Did 3×10 @ 225 on May 11 — same weight, now 4 sets.
First weighted week. Hold a 25 lb plate or single 25 lb DB at chest.
Hit all 3 sets — only 1 completed on May 11

3.name: Run · Base 1 (walk-jog — Wk 2 of running)
3.note: Structure unchanged: 5 min brisk walk → 6 rounds of (1 min easy jog / 4 min walk) → 5 min walk cooldown = 35 min total. HR target Z2 (120–140 bpm). Treadmill or track only. Cushioned shoes mandatory. Stop for sharp knee/shin/achilles pain. Post-run: hip flexor protocol (90/90, kneeling, couch stretch, propped butterfly).

4.name: Upper Pull
4.note: Elliptical 20 min warmup + 20 min cooldown. Rear-delt priority — match leading hand on all unilateral movements. Targets set from Apr benchmarks; log actual weights so next week can progress.

exercises.note: Use assisted if < 5 reps per set. Log total reps across all sets.
Benchmark 170×12; prescribing 170 at 8 reps for strength emphasis
Asymmetry check — feel left vs right activation, match reps per side

5.name: Lower Squat (quads — moderated)
5.note: Elliptical 20 min warmup + 20 min cooldown. Knee load shared with run days — if beat up, drop pendulum squat to 3 sets and skip leg extension. Weights held flat (no Week 2 export data).

exercises.note: Second hamstring dose — supports running gait

6.name: Run · Base 1 (second walk-jog) + optional carries
6.note: Second run only if Wednesday felt fine — no joint flags. 30 min: 5 min walk → 5 rounds (1 min jog / 4 min walk) → 5 min cooldown. Optional: 15 min farmers carry (3 × 30m moderate load) ONLY if no knee/ankle complaints from the run. Hip flexor protocol mandatory after. Log run + carries separately.

7.name: Rest / hip flexor + ankle protocol
7.note: Mandatory mobility: 90/90, kneeling stretch, couch stretch, propped butterfly + ankle CARs and calf stretches. 15 min. Optional: easy 30 min walk. CRITICAL: export workout_data.csv today — next week is DELOAD and Coach needs real weights to set deload loads.
